title: Papa starts a NEW round of patties (round 2), muttering about losing his mind
prompt: Medium shot of @backyard-grill-area, sunny afternoon. @Papa already CENTER-FRAME at the grill wearing @papas-apron, expression of deep dad-confusion, shaking his head slowly. He picks up a fresh package of pink ground-beef patties from the grill's lower shelf and starts slapping them onto the hot grates one by one with a sharp *sizzle-sizzle-sizzle*, talking quietly to himself the whole time like a man reasoning with the universe. Papa (muttering, mostly to himself, increasingly worried): "Okay. Cook them AGAIN. ...I am LOSING IT. That's it. The dad brain has officially CRACKED." *sizzle* He sets a hot dog onto the grates next to the patties. Papa (continuing, voice rising): "Maybe I just THOUGHT I cooked them. Maybe I'm in a dad-coma. Is this a dad-coma?" He flips a patty already, looks at it suspiciously, scratches his eyebrow with the back of the spatula handle. Papa (to himself, philosophical): "...is anyone else's dad like this?"
